title: Deep Dive Lane Setting
description: Configuration settings that define what information a deep dive lane shows. Deep dive views use these settings for per lane configuration.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: Name of the lane to display.

attributes.name: subtitle
attributes.label: subtitle
attributes.description: The subtitle of the lane to display.

attributes.name: laneType
attributes.label: laneType
attributes.description: The type of lane to render. Possible values: event, kpi, metric (the default).

attributes.name: graphType
attributes.label: graphType
attributes.description: The type of graph to render

attributes.name: search
attributes.label: search
attributes.description: The search to use to get data for the lane.

attributes.name: searchSource
attributes.label: searchSource
attributes.description: Represents how a search is generated. Possible values: datamodel, ad hoc search, or kpi search.

attributes.name: dataModelSpecification
attributes.label: dataModelSpecification
attributes.description: An object showing the selections that went into the generation of the search, null unless searchSource is data model. If defined, it is structured as {datamodel: <Data Model name> object: <Object Name>, field: <Field Info Data Structure>.

attributes.name: dataModelStatOp
attributes.label: dataModelStatOp
attributes.description: Stats operation used in the data model search.

attributes.name: dataModelWhereClause
attributes.label: dataModelWhereClause
attributes.description: Where clause defined during data model search creation.

attributes.name: overwriteKpiTitle
attributes.label: overwriteKpiTitle
attributes.description: Overwrite KPI title with user specified title.

attributes.name: overwriteEntityTitle
attributes.label: overwriteEntityTitle
attributes.description: Overwrite Entity title with user specified title.

attributes.name: kpiTitle
attributes.label: kpiTitle
attributes.description: The original title of the KPI as defined in the KPI model.

attributes.name: kpiServiceId
attributes.label: kpiServiceId
attributes.description: The id of the service associated with the selected KPI.

attributes.name: kpiUnit
attributes.label: kpiUnit
attributes.description: The unit of the KPI driving this lane.

attributes.name: kpiAddToSummary
attributes.label: kpiAddToSummary
attributes.description: Add or remove from kpi summary based on user selection. \[yes, no\] Yes runs the search against kpi summary index and no runs raw search.

attributes.name: kpiStatsOp
attributes.label: kpiStatsOp
attributes.description: Stats operation to calculate the KPI value, avg by default \[avg, max, min, median\].

attributes.name: entityAddToSummary
attributes.label: entityAddToSummary
attributes.description: Shows the accelerated output for entity lanes. Always set to "yes."

attributes.name: thresholdIndicationEnabled
attributes.label: thresholdIndicationEnabled
attributes.description: Enable/disable threshold indication. Disabled by default.

attributes.name: thresholdIndicationType
attributes.label: thresholdIndicationType
attributes.description: Type of threshold indication. \[foreground/background\] Foreground selected by default.

attributes.name: hideGraph
attributes.label: hideGraph
attributes.description: Only available with background threshold indications. If selected, hides the graph and only shows the top view with background thresholds \[yes, no\].

attributes.name: verticalAxisScale
attributes.label: verticalAxisScale
attributes.description: Determines the scale of the y axis. It is linear or log.

attributes.name: verticalAxisBoundaryType
attributes.label: verticalAxisBoundaryType
attributes.description: Determine the extent of the y axis. It is staticValue, value, or zeroValue.

attributes.name: verticalAxisStaticBounds
attributes.label: verticalAxisStaticBounds
attributes.description: If static, these are the bounds to use. Otherwise this is ignored. This is an object of the form\[<min number>, <max number>\].

attributes.name: dataGaps
attributes.label: dataGaps
attributes.description: null values in the data can be represented as gaps or connected through the graph.

attributes.name: graphColor
attributes.label: graphColor
attributes.description: The color of the graph to render.

attributes.name: graphSeries
attributes.label: graphSeries
attributes.description: The field in the data which to plot as the range, if unspecified plots all.

attributes.name: excludeSeries
attributes.label: excludeSeries
attributes.description: The series of data to omit from being displayed in graph. Series with a leading _ (indicating internal use) is always excluded.

attributes.name: laneOverlaySettingsModel
attributes.label: laneOverlaySettingsModel
attributes.description: Model to define the overlay lane settings.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
